steps.title: Locate the historians' view
steps.content: The final sentence gives the relevant claim: some historians suggest Maya mathematicians inherited the use of zero from the Olmec civilization. The answer should restate that inheritance claim.

steps.title: Reject unrelated claims
steps.content: Choice B invents a comparison between historians and mathematicians. Choice C invents secrecy, and Choice D invents an attempt to spread the writing system to others. The supported point is that Maya civilization received the use of zero from the Olmec civilization. The answer is A.
